x-note: The Mosaik platform exposes one OpenAPI spec per microservice (23 total). This bundle contains verbatim the 4 specs relevant to the Pretec Service API. Each value under specs is an unmodified OpenAPI 3.0.4 document.

post.summary: Create a new cart and add one order line
Add customer details to a cart
Add customer by id to a cart
Add signed-in customer to a cart
Create order from cart for payment methods handled externally (PayInStore, ManualInvoice, etc.)
Add a coupon code to the cart
Klarna address updated callback. Returns available shipping methods for Klarna
Klarna push callback. Called by Klarna after a successful checkout to acknowledge the order
Klarna validation callback. Called by Klarna before order is placed
Create an order from Klarna. Must be called before showing order confirmation
Get validation messages if Klarna validation failed
Add order line to a cart

delete.summary: Remove order line from the cart

post.summary: Add gift card order line to the cart
Add direct payment method to cart (PayInStore, ManualInvoice, etc.)
Create Adyen order with pending payment

get.summary: Get Nets payment info by transaction id

post.summary: Create Nets order. Call before showing order confirmation

get.summary: Walley complete checkout callback. Triggered when a purchase is successfully completed in Walley
Walley validation callback. Triggered before payment authorization

post.summary: Walley payment-failed callback. Used to log failed payments. PrivateId is not returned by Walley on this callback

get.summary: Get created order id. Use after checkout redirect to show order confirmation
Get available shipping options based on consignee postal code and cart market
Get shipping option pick up points

patch.summary: Partial update of cart fields present in the request body

put.summary: Add or update billing address to cart

get.summary: Get logged-in users last active cart

company.description: Shipping company e.g., PostNord, Bring, UPS

description.description: Short description about the shipping option

Returns single business customer by id

put.description: Anonymous users can update only those users that were created by the same session id
